_README: Wave 7+9 conviction boost overrides. Data-backed defaults from May 3 backtest (55 closed trades) + Wave 9 edge-decay defense. Edit any value and save - bot reloads on next scan. Set 'enabled': false on any layer to disable it. To revert to defaults, delete this file.
_generated_from: May 3 backtest + May 4 Wave 9 edge-decay layers

layer_1_setup_boosts._doc: Per-setup conviction boost. Positive = trust more, negative = trust less. Applied AFTER base conviction calculation, BEFORE tier mapping. Layer 6 (Wave 9) auto-zeros these when a setup goes cold.

layer_2_market_multipliers._doc: Per-market direction-aware boost. Penalizes setups going against the market's historical edge. Applied as ADDITIONAL adjustment on top of layer 1.

layer_3_bucket_recalibration._doc: Self-tuning bucket floor. When a conviction bucket has 20+ trades AND is losing, raise the bot's MIN_CONVICTION floor. Auto-managed by bot.

layer_4_priority_lane._doc: VWAP_BOUNCE_BULL bypasses family cooldown (cross-setup) but still respects 10-min same-setup dup-guard.

layer_5_auto_tune._doc: Sunday 8 PM ET: auto-run backtest, post Telegram report, adjust layer_1_setup_boosts based on rolling 4-week edge. Adjustments capped at +/-5 per cycle.

layer_6_edge_decay._doc: Wave 9 (May 4): Edge Decay Defense. Auto-zeros a Layer 1 boost if 14-day WR < 25% with 3+ trades. Penalizes -5 if WR < 30% with no positive boost. Relaxes +1 when WR recovers. Protects against fitting noise from old market regimes.

layer_7_daily_soft_tune._doc: Wave 9 (May 4): Daily soft auto-tune at 6 AM ET. Smaller caps than Layer 5 (Sunday weekly): 7-day window, +/-3 caps, $30 threshold. Calls Layer 6 first, then tunes. Compounds with Layer 5.
